title: Part 3 – Conversation : la proposition de budget
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Did you have a chance to look at the budget proposal I sent you for the marketing campaign? Man: Yes, I went through it this morning. The total seems a bit high compared to last year. Woman: I know, but we're planning to attend two trade shows this year instead of one, which explains most of the increase. Man: That makes sense. Could you also add a separate line for the printing costs? Right now they're included in the travel budget, which is confusing. Woman: Sure, I'll update the spreadsheet and send you the new version by tomorrow morning. Man: Perfect. Let's discuss it again at Thursday's meeting before submitting it to finance.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers mainly discussing?
questions.explanation: La femme demande à l'homme s'il a regardé la proposition de budget pour la campagne marketing : c'est le sujet principal.

questions.prompt: Why has the budget increased compared to last year?
choices: They will attend two trade shows instead of one
questions.explanation: Elle explique : "we're planning to attend two trade shows this year instead of one, which explains most of the increase".

questions.prompt: What does the man ask the woman to do?
choices: Cancel one of the trade shows
Submit the budget to finance immediately
Add a separate line for printing costs
Reduce the marketing budget by half
questions.explanation: Il demande : "Could you also add a separate line for the printing costs?".
